attachments.fallback: How to Easily Convert Outlook PST to MBOX? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: Easily export Outlook PST files to MBOX format with the MacSonik Outlook PST Converter Tool. This efficient utility helps users migrate all Outlook mailbox items — including emails, attachments, contacts, and calendars — to MBOX-supported email clients such as Thunderbird, Apple Mail, and Eudora. The tool supports both single and bulk file conversion, ensuring no data loss or structural changes. I…
